name: io.github.altimateai/altimate-code-data-agent
title: Altimate Code Data Agent
description: SQL, dbt, FinOps, lineage tools for data engineering. Local-first — query text never leaves your machine. Works with Snowflake, BigQuery, Databricks, Postgres, Redshift, MySQL, SQL Server, Oracle, DuckDB, SQLite.

environmentVariables.name: ALTIMATE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional Altimate API key for hosted services

environmentVariables.name: ALTIMATE_MCP_ALLOW_WRITE
environmentVariables.description: Set true to enable write tools (sql_execute mutating SQL, dbt_run). Default false (read-only).
